summary: Comprehensive testing of Mauro Ferrante Consulting Studio website completed. All major functionality working correctly including homepage with WorldMap animations, navigation to internal pages, service detail pages, partner pages, biography page, review platform links, and contact form integration with backend API.

design_issues.issue: Using regular services list format instead of specialized service cards with icons like Azequo Engineering
design_issues.note: Content is present and functional, just different formatting

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all sections including WorldMap between MethodTimeline and Reviews
Navigation from Home page to /about biography page works
Biography page shows photo, full bio, career path, competencies, languages, WorldMap, all 15 reviews
All 3 service detail pages (/services/project-management, /services/digital-marketing, /services/real-estate) load correctly with sub-services
All 3 partner pages (/partners/kw-gchouse, /partners/trem-group, /partners/azequo-engineering) load with stats and services
Azequo Engineering shows ISO certifications and 4 specialized services
Client cards on homepage link to partner pages correctly
Services section 'Learn More' buttons link to service detail pages
About section 'Discover Full Biography' link works
Review platform badges link to external URLs (LinkedIn confirmed)
WorldMap shows 12 animated country dots with pulse animations
Back to Home navigation works from all internal pages
Contact form submission works with backend API integration and success message
Backend API /api/contact POST endpoint working perfectly
All backend endpoints (root, contact, validation, service mapping, CORS) working
Desktop and mobile navigation elements present and functional
